mapper.delete: delete from kb_collect where basic_id = #{basicId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_collect t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbCollectEntity.id},'%')
AND t.basic_id like concat('%',#{kbCollectEntity.basicId},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbCollectEntity.status},'%')
AND t.user_id like concat('%',#{kbCollectEntity.userId},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbCollectEntity.createTime},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select * from kb_collect where user_id = #{userId} and basic_id = #{basicId}
select * from kb_collect where basic_id = #{basicId} and user_id = #{userId}
